# Bright Ears

> Bright Ears is the AI back office for wedding/event DJ and performer businesses. It answers every inquiry in under 5 minutes — in the owner's voice, with their real availability and rates — then follows up until the gig is booked or dead. The owner approves everything from their phone; clients only ever see the business, never the AI. Self-serve, 14-day free trial, no card.

## What it does

- Catches every lead source via simple email forwarding — plain email, website forms, and The Knot / WeddingWire / Bark / GigSalad notification emails. No password sharing, no OAuth.
- Filters spam and scam inquiries before the owner ever sees them.
- Drafts a personalized, availability-aware reply from the owner's own rate card and voice samples; median first reply is under 5 minutes.
- Owner approves or edits from their phone in one or two taps.
- Follow-up sequences (day 2/5/9) run until each lead is booked or dead, with hard stops on reply, booking, or opt-out, and compliant one-tap unsubscribe.
- Weekly report shows median response time and gigs booked.

## Pricing

- 14-day free trial (full Pro features, no credit card).
- Starter: $25/month — 15 leads/month, 1 performer.
- Pro: $79/month — 60 leads/month, follow-up sequences, per-source auto-send, weekly report.
- Studio: $149/month — multi-performer, 150 leads/month, team access.
- Overage: lead packs at $10 per 10 leads. At the cap, drafting pauses — there are never surprise bills.

## The story (verifiable)

We ran entertainment for venues for 20 years and drowned in the same inquiries, schedules, and invoices as every performer. So we built an AI back office for our own agency — her name is Vinyl, and she still runs it today at our live agency. Bright Ears is that same back office, rebuilt for your business.

## Key pages

- [Home](https://brightears.io/): what Bright Ears does, with a live demo of the reply engine
- [Pricing](https://brightears.io/pricing): plans, trial, and lead metering explained
- [Compare](https://brightears.io/compare): Bright Ears vs DJ Event Planner, HoneyBook, and other DJ software
- [Our story](https://brightears.io/story): 20 years of gigs, and the AI that runs our own agency
- [Start free](https://brightears.io/onboarding): self-serve signup, 14-day trial, no card

## Free tools

- [Inquiry Reply Generator](https://brightears.io/tools/inquiry-reply-generator): paste a real inquiry, watch a reply draft itself
- [25 Wedding DJ Inquiry & Follow-Up Templates](https://brightears.io/tools/templates): copy-paste first replies, day 2/5/9 follow-ups, review asks, rebooking and referral emails
- [Lead ROI Calculator](https://brightears.io/tools/lead-roi-calculator): what slow replies cost per year at your booking rate, with the math shown

## Who it's for

Wedding, mobile, and event DJ business owners (1–5 people) first; the same product works for any bookable performer business — bands, singers, magicians, photo booths, MCs. Not for club DJs, venues, or large agencies.
